tasks.task_goal: Retrieve a set of keys that fell through a storm drain grate
tasks.expected_outcome: The keys are lifted from the drain space and brought back to hand without removing the grate.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to extend reach
telescoping segments with secure locks
magnetic tip to couple force to the metal keys at a distance
low deflection to transmit lifting force along the length
ergonomic handle for precise positioning

tasks.task_goal: Replace a burnt-out bulb in a high gymnasium ceiling
tasks.expected_outcome: The burnt bulb is unscrewed and a new bulb installed without using a lift or ladder.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid extension pole
suction cup or spring-grip head to grip the bulb
angle-adjustable head for alignment
non-conductive shaft for electrical safety
locking telescopic mechanism to maintain length under load

tasks.task_goal: Dust the blades of a high ceiling fan
tasks.expected_outcome: Dust and debris are removed from all fan blades without climbing.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid structure to transmit sweeping force
lightweight pole to reduce bending torque
soft dusting head to capture particles at a distance
secure head connection to prevent wobble
telescoping length with positive locks

tasks.task_goal: Paint the upper walls and ceiling of a stairwell
tasks.expected_outcome: Even coats of paint are applied to elevated surfaces from the floor.
required_tool_attributes: stiff, elongated pole for reach and pressure transmission
threaded roller connection for torque transfer
non-slip grip for controlled rolling force
telescopic length adjustment to fit varying heights

tasks.task_goal: Cut small branches 12 feet above ground in a backyard
tasks.expected_outcome: Selected branches are cleanly cut and fall safely to the ground without climbing the tree.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to deliver cutting force remotely
rope-actuated or geared cutting head for force transmission
high stiffness to minimize flex during cutting
locking telescopic sections to hold reach under load

tasks.task_goal: Clear leaves from second-story house gutters
tasks.original_tool: gutter cleaning scoop on extension pole
tasks.expected_outcome: Gutters are cleared of debris while standing on the ground.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to access gutter line
angled scoop head to pull debris toward the operator
sufficient stiffness to drag loaded debris
corrosion-resistant materials for wet, dirty environments
length locks that resist twisting torque

tasks.task_goal: Skim leaves and insects from the middle of a swimming pool
tasks.original_tool: pool skimmer net with telescopic pole
tasks.expected_outcome: Floating debris is collected and removed without entering the pool.
required_tool_attributes: long, lightweight rigid pole
net frame head to capture debris at a distance
low flex to transmit lifting force through water resistance
secure telescoping locks for extended length

tasks.task_goal: Pick up trash and retrieve items from behind a low fence without entering
tasks.expected_outcome: Litter and small objects are gripped and lifted to the operator’s hand.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to extend reach
trigger mechanism to transmit grip force to distal jaws
non-slip rubberized jaws for secure grasp at a distance
lightweight construction for one-handed control

tasks.task_goal: Pull boxes forward from a high warehouse shelf
tasks.expected_outcome: Boxes are safely pulled within easy reach for manual handling.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to contact distant packages
curved hook tip to latch onto box edges
high stiffness to transmit pulling force
textured handle for controlled leverage

tasks.task_goal: Open and close a roof skylight from the floor
tasks.original_tool: skylight operating pole with hook/crank adapter
tasks.expected_outcome: The skylight is operated smoothly without a ladder.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach the skylight operator
hook or crank coupling to transmit rotational/linear force
stiff shaft to avoid torsional twist
length adjustment to match ceiling height

tasks.task_goal: Wash and squeegee exterior second-floor windows from the ground
tasks.expected_outcome: Windows are scrubbed and streak-free without scaffolding.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to reach panes
squeegee/washer combo head to apply and remove water at distance
angle-adjustable head for correct blade contact
secure telescoping locks to hold reach under pressure

tasks.task_goal: Press the test button on a ceiling-mounted smoke detector in an office
tasks.expected_outcome: The alarm is triggered and verified without accessing a ladder.
required_tool_attributes: elongated non-conductive rigid pole
soft, precise tip to depress small buttons
sufficient stiffness for accurate force application
telescoping sections that lock firmly

tasks.task_goal: Retrieve a golf ball from a water hazard
tasks.expected_outcome: The ball is scooped and brought back without entering the water.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid telescopic shaft
ring or scoop head sized for a golf ball
corrosion-resistant materials for wet use
low deflection to lift the ball steadily

tasks.task_goal: Hang string lights along roof eaves from the ground
tasks.expected_outcome: Clips and light strands are placed on eaves without climbing.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to extend reach to eaves
clip or hook head to place and release light strands
stiff shaft for precise placement
locking telescopic length for variable heights

tasks.task_goal: Hang a promotional banner on high gym rafters
tasks.expected_outcome: Banner grommets are engaged on ceiling hooks without a lift.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole for overhead reach
J-hook tip to manipulate grommets at distance
high stiffness to control lateral movement
grippy handle for steady leverage

tasks.task_goal: Pull down an attic ladder using its ceiling cord
tasks.expected_outcome: The attic ladder is safely deployed to the floor.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to catch the distant cord loop
hook tip to transfer pulling force
sufficient stiffness to overcome latch resistance
non-slip grip for controlled downward force

tasks.task_goal: Position a microphone above an actor on set without entering frame
tasks.expected_outcome: The mic is held close to the sound source while the operator remains off-camera.
required_tool_attributes: long, lightweight rigid pole for extended reach
threaded mount for shock-mount/microphone
high stiffness to minimize mic drift
secure telescopic locks for quiet operation

tasks.task_goal: Remove cobwebs from high warehouse rafters
tasks.expected_outcome: Webs and dust are cleared from beams without a lift.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach rafters
soft bristle head to snag webs at distance
stiff shaft for sweeping force transmission
locking telescopic mechanism to hold length

tasks.task_goal: Collect a mid-channel water sample from a stream bank
tasks.original_tool: telescopic sampling pole with bottle clamp
tasks.expected_outcome: A sealed bottle is filled at the target location and retrieved without wading.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to extend over water
secure clamp to hold and release sample bottle
high stiffness to manage fluid drag
corrosion-resistant materials for wet environments

tasks.task_goal: Pull snow off a low-pitch roof to reduce load
tasks.expected_outcome: Snow is dragged from the roof edge to the ground from a safe distance.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach roof sections
wide, angled rake head to transfer pulling force
stiff, lightweight construction to handle heavy loads
telescoping locks that resist torsion
